ItacAcademyItem.Name: Cassinesi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Alessio Narbone dates the foundation of the Cassinesi academy to 1688. See Alessio Narbone, Bibliografia Sicola sistematica, Palermo 1850-55.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
